title: Seeds of Gold
description: Adds some delicious functionality to sunflowers!
body:
![Seeds of Gold Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74b8dcda404ebf5ed3a33a6b3964e9badefcdec9.png)

> [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/QDSYsQzrj2) to report bugs, suggest mods or features, or to simply chat.

Useful flowers! Well... one. This mod adds Sunflower Seeds and Roasted Sunflower Seeds to the game. They make a great snack when you're out of food.

# 💰 Content
- Sunflower Seeds can be obtained by putting two sunflowers in a crafting grid.
- Roasted Sunflower Seeds can be made by putting Sunflower Seeds in a Furnace or Smoker.
